title: DeathSwap
description: Randomly swaps player positions on a timer, create traps to outsmart your friends
body:
Minecraft Deathswap

This mod adds constant tension to multiplayer survival by randomly swapping player positions at fixed intervals. Once the timer hits 0 all players on the server instantly swap locations with another random player. This works with an unlimited # of players

This minigame encourages fast thinking, risky setups, and creative traps!

Created originally for Baablu

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PCPLtB9OzP0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**How to use**
- /deathswap start - Starts the timer
- /deathswap stop - Stops the timer
- /deathswap status - Shows if timer is running or not
- /deathswap interval - Set the timer to whatever you want
